c.d: Level of encryption and security features implemented to protect files during transfer and storage.
The intuitiveness and simplicity of the app's interface, making it easy for users to share files.
Maximum file size supported for transfer, impacting the ability to share large files such as videos.
Ability to transfer files between different operating systems and devices.
How quickly and efficiently the app can upload and share files.
Compatibility with other apps and services.
The cost of using the app, including free tiers and subscription options.
